info.title: Scryme V3 API
info.description: The Scryme V3 API documentation - Scalable & Enterprise Ready

clientId.description: The Client ID provided during provisioning or registration

slug.description: The unique slug of the organization
The unique slug of the organization

banReason.description: The reason for banning the user

banExpires.description: The expiration date of the ban

slug.description: Unique slug/id for the tier, e.g., 'growth'

price.description: Monthly or annual price of the tier

limits.description: Tier limits (as a JSON/object, e.g., member limit, product limit)

reference.description: Payment reference / transaction code (e.g. M-Pesa Code)

tierSlug.description: Upgrade organization subscription to this tier slug on successful payment

isActive.description: Is this integration active and connectable
Is this integration active and connectable

isPreferred.description: Is this the preferred supplier for this product/variant?

description.example: Initial introductory call with the client.

rewardId.description: The ID of the reward to redeem

customerId.description: Internal customer ID. If omitted, it will be treated as a guest checkout.

status.description: The new status of the order

token.description: The setup token generated in the dashboard

clientId.description: The Client ID of the provisioned device

cardId.description: Optional card ID for optimized member lookup

deviceId.description: Human-assigned ID for the device (e.g., POS-001)
The internal ID of the standalone device

organizationId.description: The ID of the organization to link to

variantId.description: The ID of the product variant

items.description: List of items in the order

strapiUrl.description: Strapi v4 base URL, e.g. https://cms.example.com

apiToken.description: Full-access API token from Strapi admin → API Tokens

publicToken.description: Read-only public token for storefront queries

webhookSecret.description: HMAC secret used to verify Strapi webhook signatures

locationMap.description: Map storefront slugs to Scryme InventoryLocation IDs, e.g. { "store-lagos": "loc_abc" }

defaultLocationId.description: Default InventoryLocation ID for product sync

publicToken.description: Read-only public token for storefront queries

webhookSecret.description: HMAC secret used to verify Strapi webhook signatures

phoneNumber.description: Phone number to send OTP to

email.description: Email address to send OTP to
